exercises.starterCode:
# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.

starterFiles.content:
# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.
generated/

Community events

Saturday cleanup: 9:30 AM

Generated summary

Created automatically from project notes.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 7 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The repository-local author name is incorrect."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The repository-local author email is incorrect."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = '' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = '.gitignore
README.md
events.txt' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
actual_subjects=$(git -C "$repo" log --format=%s --reverse)
[ "$actual_subjects" = 'Start community project
Add community contacts
Update community schedule
Update community contacts
Organize community project files
Add generated summary
Ignore generated output' ] || fail "The commit history does not match the required project story."
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail "The expected file .gitignore is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail "The content of .gitignore is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/events.txt" ] || fail "The expected file events.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/events.txt")" = 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 9:30 AM' ] || fail "The content of events.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/generated/summary.txt" ] || fail "The expected file generated/summary.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/summary.txt")" = 'Generated summary

Created automatically from project notes.' ] || fail "The content of generated/summary.txt is not correct yet."

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- community-project
mkdir -p -- community-project
git -C community-project init -q -b main
git -C community-project config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C community-project config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
find community-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.
' > community-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 10:00 AM
' > community-project/schedule.txt
git -C community-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C community-project commit -q -m 'Start community project'
find community-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.
' > community-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s 'Community contacts

Help desk: 555-0100
' > community-project/contacts.txt
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 10:00 AM
' > community-project/schedule.txt
git -C community-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C community-project commit -q -m 'Add community contacts'
find community-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- community-project

Shared community activities and updates.

find community-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.
' > community-project/README.md

printf %s 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 9:30 AM

' > community-project/generated/summary.txt
git -C community-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-06T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-06T12:00:00Z git -C community-project commit -q -m 'Add generated summary'
find community-project -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s 'generated/

mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.
' > community-project/README.md
mkdir -p -- community-project
printf %s 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 9:30 AM

git -C community-project add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-07T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-07T12:00:00Z git -C community-project commit -q -m 'Ignore generated output'

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-project
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 7 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The repository-local author name is incorrect."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The repository-local author email is incorrect."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = '' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = '.gitignore
README.md
events.txt' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
actual_subjects=$(git -C "$repo" log --format=%s --reverse)
[ "$actual_subjects" = 'Start community project
Add community contacts
Update community schedule
Update community contacts
Organize community project files
Add generated summary
Ignore generated output' ] || fail "The commit history does not match the required project story."
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail "The expected file .gitignore is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail "The content of .gitignore is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Community Project

Shared community activities and updates.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/events.txt" ] || fail "The expected file events.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/events.txt")" = 'Community events

Saturday cleanup: 9:30 AM' ] || fail "The content of events.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/generated/summary.txt" ] || fail "The expected file generated/summary.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/summary.txt")" = 'Generated summary

Created automatically from project notes.' ] || fail "The content of generated/summary.txt is not correct yet."

learningGoals: Restore an unwanted unstaged working-tree edit
Unstage a path without discarding its working copy
Correct a staged accidental rewrite in the safe layer order
Preserve existing commits while correcting current state
